title: BEM-875 curator response
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM875_PROTOCOL_V13_RESPONSE.md with content # BEM-875 PROTOCOL V1.3 RESPONSE
Status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES
Findings:
- Internal contour approves protocol v1.3 with notes.
- Pre-P0 repository cleanup must become a mandatory gate before P0.
- A Worker is defined as one Curator plus one or more internal contours.
- Parallel execution requires isolated workspaces, explicit task IDs, dependency IDs, and a controlled integration lane.
- Architecture control must track target architecture, actual architecture, delta, and remaining work.
- Communication must separate live data exchange from the time registry audit log.
- Director and Worker communication baseline is a traceable task registry, preferably GitHub Issues or equivalent.
Evidence:
- governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM875_PROTOCOL_V13_REQUEST.md
- governance/audit/internal/results/BEM875_INTERNAL_PROTOCOL_V13_REVIEW.md
- governance/protocols/CURATOR_MEDIATED_INTERNAL_AUDIT_PROTOCOL.md
- Uploaded operator protocol and AI agents summary.
- Public practice reviewed: supervisor/orchestrator, handoffs, stateful workflows, typed outputs, guardrails, tracing, observability, staged autonomy.
Agreed changes:
- Add Pre-P0 repository cleanup and archive gate.
- Add multi-contour Worker model under one Curator.
- Add isolated workspaces per contour and integration lane before merge.
- Add task ID hierarchy and dependency map.
- Add architecture registry with plan/fact/delta/remaining work.
- Add policy-governed communication channels and separate time registry.
- Add enterprise customer segment and ERP pilot placeholder after P0.
- Add product-repo factory model for client-specific systems.
Strategic options:
- Option A: strict Curator-only communication. Safest, but slower and overloads Curator.
- Option B: policy-governed shared channel with Curator oversight. Recommended balance.
- Option C: free contour-to-contour exchange. Fastest, but rejected for audit and safety risk.
Recommendation:
- Approve v1.3 with Option B as the default communication model. Keep high-risk actions on Audit or Operator lane. Submit DOCX v1.3 to operator for review.
No issue comments.
